s26: This guide shows VET teachers how to use debate as a teaching tool to build students' critical thinking, communication, and teamwork skills.
s27: It covers the basics of debate, the main formats used in schools, and practical guidance for running debates in the classroom, from organizing groups to assessing students, plus a roadmap for building debate into a school's curriculum over time.
s30: A practical handbook for embedding structured debate into vocational education.
s32: Praktični priručnik za uvođenje strukturirane debate u strukovno obrazovanje.
s34: Een praktisch handboek voor het integreren van gestructureerde debatten in het beroepsonderwijs.
s36: Un manuale pratico per integrare il dibattito strutturato nella formazione professionale.
s38: Ein praktisches Handbuch zur Einbindung strukturierter Debatten in die berufliche Bildung.
